fields.title: memory: require explicit summary hooks distinct from full content
fields.description: Redesign tau memory entries so the prompt-visible summary is an explicit hook distinct from the full content body. Keep JSONL storage, keep prompt injection summary-only, and make identical summary/content impossible for new writes.
fields.design: Change the memory tool contract to require summary+content for add/update. Update the tool description and parameter descriptions to teach the hook/body model. Remove auto-summary derivation from createMemoryEntry, add validation that normalized summary and content differ, reject duplicate summaries within a scope, and keep read as the explicit full-content fetch path. Add a repair/scan path for existing persisted entries that still have summary==content before hardening load-time validation.
